agency.name: GROWSTACK
agency.tagline: Your creative partner in Marketing, Content Creation and Digital Strategy
agency.description: GROWSTACK is a creative multi-service agency offering UGC content creation, photography, web development, printing, graphic design, social media management, and marketing strategy.

services.name: UGC & Content Creation
services.shortDescription: Authentic user-generated content including TikTok videos, Instagram Reels, product reviews, and storytelling ads.
services.detailedDescription: We produce authentic, trend-driven UGC content that resonates with audiences and drives engagement. Our content is designed to feel native to each platform while maintaining professional quality. Perfect for brands looking to build trust through real-feeling content.

subServices.name: TikTok UGC Videos
subServices.description: Authentic, trend-driven TikTok content that resonates with audiences and drives engagement.

subServices.name: Instagram Reels
subServices.description: Engaging Reels content designed for maximum reach and audience growth on Instagram.

subServices.name: Product Reviews
subServices.description: Authentic product review videos that build trust and drive purchase decisions.

subServices.name: Unboxing Videos
subServices.description: Exciting unboxing content that showcases your product's first impression and packaging.

subServices.name: Lifestyle Content
subServices.description: Authentic lifestyle content that integrates your product naturally into everyday scenarios.

subServices.name: Storytelling Ads
subServices.description: Narrative-driven ad content that connects emotionally with your audience and drives conversions.

subServices.name: Tutorial Videos
subServices.description: Educational how-to content that demonstrates your product's value and builds customer confidence.

subServices.name: Before / After Videos
subServices.description: Transformation content showcasing your product's impact with compelling visual comparisons.

services.name: Photography
services.shortDescription: Professional photography services from product and lifestyle to corporate events and architectural shoots.
services.detailedDescription: Studio-grade photography services covering product, lifestyle, corporate, event, food, e-commerce, fashion, real estate, portrait, and architectural photography. Each shoot is professionally lit, styled, and edited to deliver brand-ready imagery.

subServices.name: Product Photography
subServices.description: Studio-grade product photography for catalogs, websites, and marketing materials.

subServices.name: Lifestyle Photography
subServices.description: Candid lifestyle photography that tells your brand story through authentic imagery.

subServices.name: Corporate Photography
subServices.description: Professional corporate photography including headshots, team photos, and office environments.

subServices.name: Event Photography
subServices.description: Full event coverage from conferences and launches to activations and corporate gatherings.

subServices.name: Food Photography
subServices.description: Appetizing food and beverage photography for menus, social media, and advertising.

subServices.name: E-commerce Photography
subServices.description: Scalable product photography optimized for online stores with consistent styling.

subServices.name: Fashion Photography
subServices.description: Editorial and commercial fashion photography for lookbooks, campaigns, and brand imagery.

subServices.name: Real Estate Photography
subServices.description: Professional real estate photography showcasing properties with optimal lighting.

subServices.name: Portrait Photography
subServices.description: Professional portrait sessions for personal branding, social media, and professional profiles.

subServices.name: Architectural Photography
subServices.description: Precision architectural photography capturing buildings, interiors, and spatial design.

services.name: Web Development
services.shortDescription: Custom web development including conversion-led sites, web apps, SEO, and deployment.
services.detailedDescription: We build modern, responsive websites and web applications using cutting-edge technologies. Our focus is on conversion-led design, performance optimization, and SEO readiness. Services range from simple landing pages to complex dashboards and full web applications.

subServices.name: Site Web / Website Creation
subServices.description: Professional custom website, responsive and optimized for your business.

subServices.name: Landing Page
subServices.description: Conversion-optimized landing page designed to turn visitors into customers.

subServices.name: Portfolio Website
subServices.description: Elegant portfolio site to showcase your projects and attract new clients.

subServices.name: Dashboard Creation
subServices.description: Interactive analytical dashboards to monitor your business in real-time.

subServices.name: SEO / Référencement
subServices.description: Search engine optimization to improve your site's ranking and visibility.

subServices.name: Deployment & DevOps
subServices.description: Production deployment and continuous integration for your web application.

services.name: Graphic Design
services.shortDescription: Premium graphic design services including logos, brand identities, social media creatives, and packaging.
services.detailedDescription: We create visually compelling designs that communicate your brand's essence. From logo design and complete brand identity systems to social media graphics, packaging, and print materials. Every design is crafted with attention to detail and brand consistency.

subServices.name: Logo Design
subServices.description: Unique, memorable logo designs that capture your brand essence.
features: Final file package in all formats

subServices.name: Brand Identity
subServices.description: Complete visual identity system with logo, colors, typography, and brand guidelines.

subServices.name: Social Media Design
subServices.description: Eye-catching social media graphics, templates, and cover art.

subServices.name: Poster Design
subServices.description: Impactful poster designs for events, promotions, and advertising.

subServices.name: Flyer Design
subServices.description: Professional flyer designs for promotions, events, and business communications.

subServices.name: Business Cards
subServices.description: Premium business card designs with unique finishes and formats.

subServices.name: Packaging Design
subServices.description: Product packaging design from concept to production-ready artwork.

subServices.name: Infographic Design
subServices.description: Data-driven infographic designs that communicate complex information visually.

services.name: Social Media Management
services.shortDescription: Full-spectrum social media management across Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, and LinkedIn.
services.detailedDescription: We manage your entire social media presence with data-driven strategies, daily content creation, community engagement, and performance analytics. Our services cover Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, LinkedIn, content planning, community management, and analytics reporting.

subServices.name: Instagram Management
subServices.description: Full Instagram account management with content creation, scheduling, engagement, and growth.

subServices.name: Facebook Management
subServices.description: Strategic Facebook page management with engaging content and community building.

subServices.name: TikTok Management
subServices.description: Trend-driven TikTok content strategy, viral video production, and audience growth.

subServices.name: LinkedIn Management
subServices.description: Professional LinkedIn presence with thought leadership content and B2B networking.

subServices.name: Content Calendar
subServices.description: Strategic monthly content planning with platform-specific scheduling.

subServices.name: Community Management
subServices.description: Dedicated community engagement, comment moderation, and brand advocacy.

subServices.name: Analytics & Reporting
subServices.description: Comprehensive monthly analytics with actionable insights and recommendations.

services.name: Marketing Strategy
services.shortDescription: Data-driven marketing strategies from brand positioning and market research to growth and launch strategies.
services.detailedDescription: We develop comprehensive marketing strategies grounded in research and data. From defining your brand's market position to creating growth funnels and launch campaigns, our strategies are actionable, measurable, and tailored to your business goals.

subServices.name: Brand Positioning
subServices.description: Define your brand's unique position in the market with a compelling value proposition.

subServices.name: Market Research
subServices.description: Deep-dive research into your market, audience segments, and industry trends.

subServices.name: Competitor Analysis
subServices.description: Comprehensive competitor benchmarking to identify market gaps.

subServices.name: Content Strategy
subServices.description: Comprehensive content plan aligned with your brand goals and audience needs.

subServices.name: Funnel Strategy
subServices.description: Optimized conversion funnels from awareness to retention.

subServices.name: Launch Strategy
subServices.description: Go-to-market strategy for new products, services, or campaigns.

subServices.name: Growth Strategy
subServices.description: Scalable growth frameworks to accelerate your business.

services.name: Printing Services
services.shortDescription: Professional printing services including business cards, flyers, packaging, and merchandise.
services.detailedDescription: High-quality printing services with premium finishing options, multiple material choices, and delivery support. We handle everything from business cards and flyers to product packaging and custom merchandise. Our print services complement our graphic design offerings for a seamless experience.

subServices.name: Business Cards
subServices.description: Premium business cards with various finishes including matte, gloss, and spot UV.

subServices.name: Flyers & Leaflets
subServices.description: Professional flyers and leaflets for promotions and events.

subServices.name: Posters & Banners
subServices.description: Large format printing for posters, banners, and roll-ups.

subServices.name: Packaging Printing
subServices.description: Custom packaging printing including boxes, bags, and labels.

subServices.name: Merchandise
subServices.description: Custom branded merchandise including t-shirts, hoodies, and accessories.

services.note: Contact us for a custom quote. Design files can be provided by our Graphic Design team.

general.paymentTerms: We accept credit card, bank transfer, and PayPal. Payment is split: 50% deposit at project launch, 50% balance upon delivery. Multi-service cart discounts apply automatically.
general.revisionPolicy: Each project includes revision rounds. Unlimited revisions available on select premium packages. Additional revision rounds beyond the included scope may be billed separately depending on the complexity.
general.deliveryTimes: Most projects are delivered within 7 to 14 business days. Photography and printing services often have faster turnaround. Complex web applications and comprehensive marketing strategies may take 2-4 weeks depending on scope.
general.multiServiceDiscounts: 10% off when ordering 2 services, 15% off for 3 services, 20% off for 4 or more services. Discounts are applied automatically at checkout.
general.contactInfo: For specific questions, quotes, or to start a project: contact our team at contact@growstack.app or fill out the contact form on our website.
